testcase.name: searchPosts_findsMatchingPosts
testcase.system-out: 18:23:37.347 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [ main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy &amp#27;[0;39m | 1b7ba642 | Securing POST /api/v1/auth/register 18:23:37.347 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [ main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter &amp#27;[0;39m | 1b7ba642 | Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 18:23:37.347 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [ main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy &amp#27;[0;39m | 1b7ba642 | Secured POST /api/v1/auth/register 18:23:37.349 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [ main] &amp#27;[36morg.hibernate.SQL &amp#27;[0;39m | 1b7ba642 | select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only 18:23:37.351 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [ main] &amp#27;[36morg.hibernate.SQL &amp#27;[0;39m | 1b7ba642 | select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only 18:23:37.574 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [ main] &amp#27;[36morg.hibernate.SQL &amp#27;[0;39m | 1b7ba642 | insert into users (is_active, avatar_url, is_banned, bio, created_at, display_name, email, github_url, location, password_hash, reputation_score, role, updated_at, username, website_url, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
